changelog:
• Products Showcase page with date picker, image thumbnails, color dots, categories, partner info, QA status, favorites, and text filtering
• Admin agent selector — person icon opens dialog to pick which agent's products to view
• Agent name shown as subtitle under Products Showcase title
• QA status dropdown for admin — select from predefined options and Update button saves to sheet
• Loading spinner during QA update, auto-reload after update
• Mistake products sorted to top with red card background
• Tag chips (column G) displayed inline in top row as green rounded chips
• Product deduplication by link — duplicate links filtered on load
• Delux DLC hourly chart icon — bar chart showing product posting by hour (6AM-9PM)
• Auto QC icon — runs mother vs child category matching rules, shows report dialog with mistakes
• Delux DLC gold banner highlighting premium features
• Products fetched from agent's personal sheet with date-named tabs
